creator: billf@jade.chc-chimes.com
text:
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  bin  512 Oct 10 22:03 /var/db/pkg/mysql-3.22.6a/

Fix: 

my C abilities aren't real swift so I'll stick to writing cheesy text 
manipulation programs. I think it may be related to the 321->322 change in 
mysql, though.
How-To-Repeat: 
===>  Building for xmysqladmin-0.4.4
cc utils.c -O -c -DPIXMAPFILE=\"/usr/X11R6/include/X11/pixmaps/mysql.xpm\"  
-DBACKUP=\""tar cvzf"\" -DBACKUPDIR=\"/tmp\"  -DBACKUPSUFFIX=\"".gz"\"  
-DMYSQL_VERSION=321 -I/usr/X11R6/include -I/usr/local/include/mysql 
-DMYSQLDBDIR="\"/var/db/mysql/\"" 
utils.c: In function `g_mysql_connect':
utils.c:20: warning: passing arg 5 of `mysql_real_connect' makes pointer from 
integer without a cast
utils.c:20: warning: passing arg 6 of `mysql_real_connect' makes integer from 
pointer without a cast
utils.c:20: too few arguments to function `mysql_real_connect'

===>  Building for xmysql-1.8
cc -c XmysqlDB.c -O -DXMYSQL_XPMPATH=\"/usr/X11R6/include/X11/pixmaps\" 
-DXMYSQL_HELPPATH=\"/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/xmysql\" -I/usr/X11R6/include 
-I/usr/local/include/mysql 
XmysqlDB.c: In function `XmysqlDB':
XmysqlDB.c:83: warning: passing arg 5 of `mysql_real_connect' makes pointer 
from integer without a cast
XmysqlDB.c:83: warning: passing arg 6 of `mysql_real_connect' makes integer 
from pointer without a cast
XmysqlDB.c:83: too few arguments to function `mysql_real_connect'
XmysqlDB.c:731: warning: assignment from incompatible pointer type
*** Error code 1
